<!-- source-snippet repo="cn-quickstart" path="sdk/docs/sharable/sdk/quickstart/operate/how-to-onboard-external-parties-in-quickstart.rst" commit="5327209dd3223f985ed91803787e3b18c8ad77cb" snippet="cn-quickstart-rst-code-sdk-docs-sharable-sdk-quickstart-operate-how-to-onboard-external-parties-in-quickstart-bash-275" location="lines:275-285" -->
```bash
  # List party-to-participant mappings to verify party is in topology
  grpcurl -plaintext -d '{
    "base_query": {
      "store": {
        "synchronizer": {"id": "'"$SYNCHRONIZER_ID"'"}
      },
      "head_state": {}
    },
    "filter_party": "'"$PARTY_ID"'"
  }' localhost:2902 com.digitalasset.canton.topology.admin.v30.TopologyManagerReadService/ListPartyToParticipant

```
